column2: Verify that Delivery Staff can update delivery status only through valid workflow transitions (ASSIGNED → PICKED_UP → IN_TRANSIT → DELIVERED or FAILED); that reverse transitions are blocked; and that FAILED status requires a reason (UC-14).
Delivery Staff confirms pickup of an assigned order
column3:
1. Log in as Delivery Staff.
2. Navigate to the Delivery Dashboard.
3. Find an order with delivery status ASSIGNED.
4. Click "Đã lấy hàng" (Picked Up).
column4: Delivery status changes to PICKED_UP; picked_up_at timestamp is recorded; customer receives an update notification.
column5: An order with delivery status ASSIGNED exists for this staff member.

column2: Delivery Staff marks order as IN_TRANSIT
column3:
1. Find an order with delivery status PICKED_UP.
2. Click "Đang giao" (In Transit).
column4: Delivery status changes to IN_TRANSIT; the timestamp is recorded; customer is notified.

column2: Delivery Staff marks order as DELIVERED
column3:
1. Find an order with delivery status IN_TRANSIT.
2. Click "Đã giao" (Delivered).
column4: Delivery status changes to DELIVERED; delivered_at timestamp is recorded; order status in the main order table advances to DELIVERED; customer receives a delivery confirmation notification.

column2: Delivery Staff reports a failed delivery without providing a reason
column3:
1. Find an order with delivery status IN_TRANSIT.
2. Click "Giao thất bại" (Failed) without entering a failure reason.
column4: System blocks the action; an error message is shown requiring failure_reason; delivery status remains IN_TRANSIT.

column2: Delivery Staff reports a failed delivery with a valid reason
column3:
1. Find an order with delivery status IN_TRANSIT.
2. Enter a failure reason (e.g., "Khách hàng không có ở nhà").
3. Click "Giao thất bại" (Failed).
column4: Delivery status changes to FAILED; failure_reason is stored; customer and shop owner are notified; order status is updated appropriately.

column2: Verify Delivery Staff can only see and update their own assigned orders
column3:
1. Log in as Delivery Staff A.
2. Navigate to the Delivery Dashboard.
3. Attempt to access an order assigned to Delivery Staff B (by direct URL).
column4: Only orders assigned to Staff A are visible in the dashboard; attempting to access an order assigned to Staff B returns 403 or redirects.
column5: Two delivery staff accounts with separate assignments exist.
